get.description: Fetches all activity logs recorded in the system.

get.summary: Get activity logs by log name
get.description: Fetches activity logs filtered by log name.

parameters.name: log_name
parameters.description: The name of the log to filter by

200.description: Activity logs retrieved successfully by log name.

message.example: Activity logs for log name 'Auth' retrieved successfully.
No logs found for the provided log name.

get.summary: Get activity logs by date and time range
get.description: Fetches activity logs filtered by a specific date and time range.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The start date and time for the log filter in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end date and time for the log filter in ISO 8601 format.

200.description: Activity logs retrieved successfully by date range.

message.example: Activity logs retrieved successfully for the specified date range.

items.example: Start date must be earlier than end date.

message.example: Error retrieving logs by date range.

post.description: Registers a new user, optionally with a profile picture, and returns a JWT token.

message.example: The email has already been taken.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token upon successful login.

items.example: The provided email address is not registered.

post.description: Invalidates the JWT token and logs the user out.
Generates a new JWT token using the current token.

get.description: Returns the details of the currently authenticated user.

401.description: Unauthorized - Token is missing or invalid.

message.example: Unauthorized - Token is missing or invalid.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all available permissions. JWT Bearer token is required.

post.description: Creates one or more permissions. JWT Bearer token is required.

delete.description: Deletes multiple permissions by their IDs. JWT Bearer token is required.

ids.description: Array of permission IDs to delete

404.description: One or more permissions not found.

message.example: One or more permissions not found.

get.description: Retrieve all roles along with their assigned permissions. JWT Bearer token is required.

post.description: Creates one or more roles and assigns permissions to each role. At least one permission is required per role. JWT Bearer token is required.

get.summary: Get a specific role with its permissions
get.description: Retrieve a specific role and its associated permissions by role ID. If the role has no permissions assigned, it will still be included. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to retrieve

items.example: The specified role does not exist.

put.summary: Update role details and manage permissions
put.description: Updates a role's details and assigns or detaches permissions. At least one permission is required. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to update

permissions.description: Array of permission IDs to assign to the role

message.example: Role updated and permissions updated successfully.

items.example: The specified role does not exist.
At least one permission is required.

post.description: Assign one or more permissions to an existing role. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the role to assign permissions to.

items.example: The specified role does not exist.

get.description: Fetch the details of a specific role, including its associated permissions. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to fetch details

put.description: Updates the details of a specific role by role ID. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to update

items.example: The specified role does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a specific role by ID. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the role to delete

delete.description: Detach one or more permissions from a specific role. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: role_id
parameters.description: The ID of the role from which permissions will be detached.

permissions.description: Array of permission IDs to detach

get.description: Retrieve the details of a specific permission by its ID. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the permission to retrieve

put.description: Updates the details of a specific permission by its ID. Only the name of the permission can be updated. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the permission to edit

delete.description: Deletes a specific permission by its ID. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the permission to delete.

get.summary: Get all roles with their permissions
get.description: Retrieve all roles and their associated permissions. If a role has no permissions assigned, it will still be included. JWT Bearer token is required.
Retrieve a list of all users. JWT Bearer token is required.

post.description: Creates a new user and returns the created user details. JWT Bearer token is required.

items.example: The email has already been taken.

delete.description: Deletes multiple users by IDs. JWT Bearer token is required.

ids.description: Array of user IDs to delete

404.description: One or more users not found.

message.example: One or more users not found.

get.description: Retrieve the details of a specific user by their ID. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the user to retrieve.

items.example: The specified user does not exist.

put.description: Updates the details of a specific user by ID. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to update

delete.description: Deletes a specific user by ID. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to delete

post.description: Create multiple users in a single request. JWT Bearer token is required.

patch.description: Updates the status of a user. Only boolean values are accepted. JWT Bearer token is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to update

bearerAuth.description: Enter your Bearer token in the format: Bearer {token}

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Endpoints for authentication and user management.

tags.name: Activity Logs
tags.description: Endpoints for activity logs. Using this API's we can get all user logs.

tags.name: Role & Permission
tags.description: Endpoints for Roles And Permissions. Using this API's we can manage all permissions and roles.
